<?php /* * This file is part of the Fidry CPUCounter Config package. * * (c) Théo FIDRY <theo.fidry@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Fidry\CpuCoreCounter\Finder; /** * Find the number of physical CPU cores for Linux, BSD and OSX. * * @see https://github.com/paratestphp/paratest/blob/c163539818fd96308ca8dc60f46088461e366ed4/src/Runners/PHPUnit/Options.php#L903-L909 * @see https://opensource.apple.com/source/xnu/xnu-792.2.4/libkern/libkern/sysctl.h.auto.html */ final class HwPhysicalFinder extends ProcOpenBasedFinder { protected function getCommand(): string { return 'sysctl -n hw.physicalcpu'; } public function toString(): string { return 'HwPhysicalFinder'; } }
